prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
For transformer T-020, combine DGA diagnostics with thermal anomaly trends to decide whether to schedule immediate outage maintenance or defer with heightened monitoring.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should integrate DGA-based diagnosis and trend/anomaly evidence, make a binary maintenance decision (immediate outage vs deferred monitoring), and provide an actionable work-order or monitoring plan.

## Agent Plan
(no plan)

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "turn": 1,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "",
    "tool_calls": [
      {
        "name": "analyze_dga",
        "arguments": {
          "h2": 10,
          "ch4": 20,
          "c2h2": 30,
          "c2h4": 40,
          "c2h6": 50,
          "transformer_id": "T-020"
        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-bfed21370c79f142",
        "output": {
          "type": "text",
          "text": "{\n  \"iec_code\": \"T1\",\n  \"diagnosis\": \"Thermal fault, t < 300 \u00b0C\",\n  \"r1_ch4_h2\": 2.0,\n  \"r2_c2h2_c2h4\": 0.75,\n  \"r3_c2h4_c2h6\": 0.8,\n  \"input_gases\": {\n    \"h2_ppm\": 10.0,\n    \"ch4_ppm\": 20.0,\n    \"c2h2_ppm\": 30.0,\n    \"c2h4_ppm\": 40.0,\n    \"c2h6_ppm\": 50.0\n  },\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-020\"\n}"
        }
      },
      {
        "name": "trend_analysis",
        "arguments": {
          "transformer_id": "T-020",
          "sensor_id": "winding_temp_c",
          "start_time": "2022-01-01T00:00:00Z",
          "end_time": "2022-12-31T23:59:59Z"
        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-afa4a6c754caa801",
        "output": {
          "type": "text",
          "text": "{\n  \"error\": \"No readings for transformer='T-020' sensor='winding_temp_c'.\"\n}"
        }
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "turn": 2,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "Based on the DGA diagnostics and thermal anomaly trends, it appears that the transformer T-020 has a thermal fault with a temperature below 300 \u00b0C. However, there are no readings for the winding temperature sensor, so we cannot determine the current temperature of the transformer.\n\nConsidering the DGA diagnostics, it may be recommended to schedule immediate outage maintenance to prevent further damage to the transformer. However, without the current temperature reading, it is difficult to make a definitive decision.\n\nIt may be best to defer with heightened monitoring to ensure that the transformer does not experience any further issues. This will allow for continued operation while also allowing for closer monitoring of the transformer's condition.",
    "tool_calls": []
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
Based on the DGA diagnostics and thermal anomaly trends, it appears that the transformer T-020 has a thermal fault with a temperature below 300 °C. However, there are no readings for the winding temperature sensor, so we cannot determine the current temperature of the transformer.

Considering the DGA diagnostics, it may be recommended to schedule immediate outage maintenance to prevent further damage to the transformer. However, without the current temperature reading, it is difficult to make a definitive decision.

It may be best to defer with heightened monitoring to ensure that the transformer does not experience any further issues. This will allow for continued operation while also allowing for closer monitoring of the transformer's condition.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": false,
    "generalized_result_verification": false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true,
    "hallucinations": true,
    "suggestions": "Implement error handling for missing sensor data and provide a clear maintenance or monitoring plan."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Implement error handling for missing sensor data and provide a clear maintenance or monitoring plan.
